title: Emerald Coin

**Emerald Coin** replaces the default emerald textures with clean, golden pixel-art coins.  
This pack is perfect for players and servers with trade systems, RPG mechanics, shops, or medieval-style economies.

### ‚ú® Features
- Emeralds become gold coins
- True pixel-art aesthetic
- Very lightweight & performance-friendly
- Works seamlessly with other resource packs

### ūü™ô Why use this pack?
If emeralds function as your world‚Äôs currency, a visual transformation into actual coins increases immersion and makes trading feel more meaningful and fun.
